description.en: Translates human-readable domain names (e.g. example.com) to IP addresses. The backbone of Internet name resolution, used by virtually every networked application.
description.zh: 将人类可读的域名（如 example.com）解析为IP地址。互联网域名解析的基础设施，几乎所有联网应用都依赖DNS。

id.en: Transaction ID, used to match requests and responses
id.zh: 事务ID，用于匹配请求和响应

qr.zh: 查询/响应标志 (0=查询, 1=响应)

opcode.zh: 操作码 (0=标准查询, 1=反向查询, 2=状态请求)

aa.en: Authoritative Answer, set if responding server is authoritative
aa.zh: 权威应答，响应服务器是否为该域的权威服务器

tc.en: Truncated, set if message was truncated due to length
tc.zh: 截断标志，消息因长度限制被截断时置1

rd.en: Recursion Desired, client requests recursive resolution
rd.zh: 期望递归，客户端请求递归解析

ra.en: Recursion Available, server supports recursive queries
ra.zh: 可用递归，服务器支持递归查询

rcode.en: Response code (0=no error, 1=format error, 2=server fail, 3=name error)
rcode.zh: 响应码 (0=无错误, 1=格式错误, 2=服务器失败, 3=域名不存在)

qdcount.en: Number of entries in the question section

ancount.en: Number of resource records in the answer section
ancount.zh: 回答区域的资源记录数

nscount.zh: 授权区域的资源记录数

arcount.zh: 附加区域的资源记录数
